creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Please supply more details: output of "ifconfig" and "netstat -rn" for older version after OpenVPN tunnel successfully established.

What is the task you need OpenVPN within single host for?

Does the problem vanish for recent version if you change netmask from 255.255.255.0 to 255.255.255.255 for point-to-point tun interfaces?
